mappings.rationaleAI: Music covering performance, composition, notation, and digital technology addresses the art of music (A), diverse conceptions (A.1), performance and interpretation (A.3), musical instruments (B.3), elements of music (C), notation (D), and recording and reproduction (F).
The symphony orchestra covering its structure and historical roots addresses musical instruments (B.3), orchestration and instrumentation (C.7), and the symphony (E.2.a.ii).
Western music from Medieval through Baroque periods covering Gregorian chant and historical instruments addresses the history of Western music (G.1) and liturgical chant (E.1.b.i).
Beethoven's musical works and career address the history of Western music (G.1) and the symphony as a compositional form (E.2.a.ii).
Blues as an American musical tradition from work songs through rhythm and blues addresses genres determined by cultural milieu: popular music (E.4) and jazz (E.2.b) through its influence.
Global folk music traditions spanning diverse cultures directly address genres determined by cultural milieu: folk music (E.4).
Country music as an American popular genre from folk and rural roots addresses genres determined by cultural milieu: popular music (E.4).
World music encompassing non-Western traditions addresses genres determined by cultural milieu (E.4). Recording technology and the audio moment address recording and reproduction of music (F).
Ethnomusicology studying music across geographic diversity addresses the relation of music to other human activities (A.4) and genres determined by cultural milieu (E.4).
Psychology of music covering cognitive mechanisms and emotional responses addresses problems of musical meaning (A.2) and writings about music (A.5).

Technology's role in music covering instruments, recording, and streaming addresses electrophonic instruments (B.3.d), recording and reproduction (F), types of reproduction (F.1), and development of music recording (F.4).
Film music covering composition for cinema directly addresses incidental and background music for motion pictures (E.3.c.iv).
Physics of sound covering wave behavior, frequency, pitch, and resonance addresses the physical aspects of musical sound (B.1).
Adorno's critique of capitalism's effects on music addresses problems of musical meaning (A.2) and writings about music (A.5).
Covers theatre as a global artistic form including musical theatre and integration of dance, literature, and music, directly addressing music theatre including musicals and operetta.
